title: Future perfect — 'will have done'
objectives: Use it for past-from-future-perspective and present-time speculation

vocab.es: habré / habrás / habrá / habremos / habréis / habrán

grammar_notes: Pattern: future of 'haber' + participle. 'Para mañana, habré terminado el proyecto.'
Also used for PAST speculation: '¿Habrá visto la noticia?' = 'I wonder if he saw the news / he must have seen the news.'
example_phrases: Habrá olvidado la cita. (He must have forgotten the appointment.)
